1) **Restart status:** Manual gateway restart is complete, and Prom is back online and responding (this message confirms post-restart response path is working). Build status from the latest completed change is still **green** (`npm run build` previously passed with `tsc` exit code 0).

2) **What changed (high-level):** No new files were changed in this restart; it was an operational restart only. The recently deployed routing update remains in effect (boot/hot-restart outputs go to fresh unread automated sessions, with consistent notification handling and backward-compatible payload fields).

3) **What do you want verified next?** I can now verify any specific post-restart behavior you want (e.g., Telegram command handling like `/help` or `/screenshot`, automated session notification flow, or task/schedule responsiveness).
